summary: Tested the new #antiplanilha Apple-style comparison section on the SGF landing page. All visual elements, text content, colors, animations, responsive layout, and surrounding sections verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static HTML site at localhost:3000. #antiplanilha section fully implemented and verified. All 10 specs (5 red, 5 gold), gradient cards, animations, mobile responsive, closing block all working correctly.
